title: Supply Chain Manager - Panalpina India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Panalpina India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!
